title: cadelaria indica
intro: Cadelaria indica, also known as Sutherlandia frutescens, is a shrub-like plant native to southern Africa, particularly in the arid regions of South Africa. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to boost the immune system and has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cadelaria indica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various diseases, including HIV/AIDS, TB, and cancer. The plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine as a capsule or powder.
